Agentsudo

About Me!

Insert Quote Here -Anon


Welcome to my website! I hope this page leaves good impressions on you as I have put lots of time and effort whenever I have freetime, to improve this website.

The intentions of making this website is to not only have a place to show off my skills in web development but to also store blog writings about anything in my interest.

Every page here has been made using the Astro Framework, entirely from scratch.

The source code can be found on my github if you would like to look at how I did all this.

Anyways I hope you enjoy!

:3
